title: Wagner Moura Wins Best Actor at 2026 Golden Globes - Collider
text: Wagner Moura claimed the Golden Globe for Best Performance by a Male Actor in a Motion Picture Drama for his role in The Secret Agent. The film was also awarded Best Non-English Language Film. The competition featured diverse acting approaches, with nominees including Dwayne Johnson in The Smashing Machine, Jeremy Allen White in Springsteen: Deliver Me from Nowhere, Joel Edgerton in Train Dreams, Michael B. Jordan in Sinners, and Oscar Isaac in Frankenstein. According to analysis, Moura delivered a controlled, psychologically precise performance that stood out for holding its film together from within. The win positions Moura as a reference point in the ongoing acting race heading into subsequent awards ceremonies.
